info.name: GraphQL – AI Chats Module
info.description: AI Chats: aiChats, aiChat; createAIChat, updateAIChat, deleteAIChat, sendMessage; analyzeEmailRisk, generateCompanySummary, parseContactFilters. Variables: use camelCase. See sql/apis/17_AI_CHATS_MODULE.md (Queries and mutations – parameters and variable types).

body.raw: {"query":"query { aiChats { aiChats(filters: { limit: 20 }) { items { uuid title } pageInfo { total } } } }","variables":{}}
{"query":"query GetAIChat($chatId: String!) { aiChats { aiChat(chatId: $chatId) { uuid title messages { sender text } } } }","variables":{"chatId":"{{chatId}}"}}

body: query":"mutation CreateAIChat($input: CreateAIChatInput!) { aiChats { createAIChat(input: $input) { uuid title } } }","variables":{"input":{"title":"Chat","messages":[]}}
query":"mutation SendMessage($chatId: String!, $text: String!) { aiChats { sendMessage(chatId: $chatId, text: $text) { uuid } } }","variables":{"chatId":"{{chatId}}","text":"Hello"}}
query":"query AnalyzeEmailRisk($email: String!) { aiChats { analyzeEmailRisk(email: $email) { riskScore analysis } } }","variables":{"email":"info@example.com"}}
query":"query ParseContactFilters($text: String!) { aiChats { parseContactFilters(text: $text) { jobTitles companyNames industry } } }","variables":{"text":"VPs in tech"}}
